name: @resist/vscode
description: Real-time linting, auto-fix, and workspace tooling for the Resist monorepo

commands.title: Lint: Restart and Re-Check Open Files

resist.lint.enable.description: Controls whether the Resist linter is active. When disabled, no diagnostics are produced and no CLI processes are spawned.

resist.lint.onSave.description: Automatically lint files each time they are saved.

resist.lint.onType.description: Lint files as you type, after a configurable debounce delay.

resist.lint.onOpen.description: Lint files immediately when they are opened in the editor.

resist.lint.debounceMs.description: Delay in milliseconds before lint-on-type triggers after the last keystroke. Lower values give faster feedback but increase CPU usage.

resist.lint.maxProblems.description: Maximum number of diagnostics reported per file. Limits output in files with many issues.

resist.lint.stage.description: Stage gate that determines which rules are active. Each rule declares which stages it runs in.

resist.lint.categories.description: Filter rules by category. Only rules matching these categories will run. Leave empty to run all categories.

resist.lint.args.description: Additional CLI arguments passed directly to the resist-lint process. Use for flags not exposed as dedicated settings.

resist.lint.cache.description: Cache file hashes to skip unchanged files on subsequent lint runs. Disable to force a full re-check every time.

resist.lint.quiet.description: Suppress warnings and only report errors. Useful for focusing on critical issues.

resist.lint.debug.description: Log detailed debug information (timing, cache stats, rule counts) to the Resist output channel.

resist.lint.severityOverride.description: Override the severity of all rules globally. Leave empty to use each rule's configured severity.

resist.lint.rule.description: Run only a single rule by its ID (e.g., 'naming/no-default-export'). Useful for debugging individual rules. Leave empty to run all rules.

resist.lint.ignorePatterns.description: Glob patterns for files and directories to exclude from linting (e.g., 'dist/**', '*.generated.ts').

resist.lint.jobs.description: Number of parallel worker threads for linting. Set to 0 to auto-detect based on available CPU cores.

resist.lint.tools.description: Enable external tool integration (e.g., dependency-cruiser, knip, typos). External tools must be installed separately.

resist.lint.locale.description: Locale code for diagnostic messages (e.g., 'en'). Leave empty to use the system default locale.

resist.lint.bail.description: Stop the linter after the first error is found. Useful for large workspaces where you want fast failure.

scripts.install-local: pnpm build && pnpm package && code --install-extension $(ls -t *.vsix | head -1)
